title: Lotus 15 x Children/Kids Plain Coloured Party Boxes Carry Food Meal Fun Picnic Birthday Wedding Favour/Baby Shower Party Halloween Trick or Treat Box Loot Bag (Orange)
features: Lotus branded: Size: 15cm x 10cm x 10cm (the standard and most popular size)
Perfect for High quality Food/ loot/ party/ meal/ gift/ goody/ wedding favours/ box/ boxes and all hot and cold food substances.
High quality recyclable carry meal boxes, Great for hot items as this comes with a perforated ventilation
Boxes come flat-packed for transit purposes. Pop open easily and sealed with the side tabs
Easy to assemble and no glue required! Great for christmas birthday party fillers events weddings
description: Versatile Usage: These Lotus party boxes are designed to cater to a wide range of needs, from storing high-quality food and organizing party favors to presenting meals, gifts, and serving as elegant wedding or event favors. Recyclable and Durable: Crafted from eco-friendly, perforated cardboard, these boxes are not only durable but also recyclable, ensuring sustainability without compromising on quality. Convenient Design: Each box is flat-packed for easy transportation and storage, making them ideal for events where setup time is crucial. Easy Assembly: No glue or complex instructions are needed; these boxes are designed for quick and straightforward assembly. Whether you're preparing for a festive Christmas gathering, a lively birthday party, an elegant wedding reception, or any other special event, setting up these boxes is hassle-free. Popular Size: Each box measures approximately 15cm x 10cm x 10cm, making it versatile enough to accommodate a variety of contents while remaining compact and easy to handle. Color Options: Choose from a wide range of colors including classic plains, charming polka-dots, stylish stripes, and licensed designs. Select the color that best complements your event theme or personal style to create a cohesive and festive atmosphere. Vibrant and Versatile Orange Color: The orange-colored party boxes from Lotus bring vibrancy and warmth to any event. Whether used for festive celebrations or themed parties, the orange color adds a cheerful touch that enhances the décor and atmosphere, leaving a lasting impression on guests. Decorative Potential: These versatile boxes can be customized and decorated to match your event theme or personalized with custom labels and embellishments. Brand: Lotus Color: Orange Item Form: Box Package Dimensions: 26 x 22.3 x 1.9 cm; 315 g Size: 15cm x 10cm x 10cm Material: Perforated Cardboard Special Feature: Perforated
